'''Carlio''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent and a member of the [[Sandwind group|Sandwind Team]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Carlio, along with [[Swanze]], was one of the Sandwind operatives to spot the [[Jundland Banshee]]. The Banshee was at [[Beggar's Canyon/Legends|Beggar's Canyon]].<ref name="AIR" />
